summary: Iteration 41 - Ubuntoo Community API integration testing. All 13 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working: dynamic exchange loading, posting new exchanges with AI detection, success notice mentioning Observatoire, filter buttons, group filtering with detected skills badges. Observatoire 'Ouvrir Ubuntoo' link correctly points to /ubuntoo.
test_credentials: No auth required for /ubuntoo page or API endpoints
seed_data_creation: Multiple test exchanges created during testing (PytestUser, PlaywrightTest, DashboardTest)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ubuntoo community features fully functional. GET /api/ubuntoo/community/exchanges returns exchanges with group field. POST creates new exchange with AI detection (GPT-5.2). Dashboard stats update after posting. Frontend loads exchanges dynamically, form has all fields, success notice appears after posting.

backend_api.GET_exchanges_returns_list: PASSED - Returns list of exchanges from DB
backend_api.exchanges_have_group_field: PASSED - All exchanges have required fields including 'group'
backend_api.POST_creates_exchange: PASSED - Creates new exchange with AI-detected skills
backend_api.POST_returns_detected_skills: PASSED - Response includes detected_skills, detected_tools, detected_practices
backend_api.new_exchange_appears_in_GET: PASSED - New exchange visible in GET after POST
backend_api.dashboard_updates_after_post: PASSED - Stats increment after new exchange
backend_api.signals_endpoint: PASSED - GET /api/ubuntoo/signals returns list with required fields

frontend_ui.publier_button_exists: PASSED - 'Publier' button visible in Discussions tab
frontend_ui.form_opens_on_click: PASSED - Form appears when clicking Publier
frontend_ui.form_has_all_fields: PASSED - title, content, type, group, author fields present
frontend_ui.form_submission_works: PASSED - Form submits and creates exchange
frontend_ui.success_notice_appears: PASSED - Green notice mentions 'Observatoire' after posting
frontend_ui.new_exchange_in_list: PASSED - New exchange appears in thread list
frontend_ui.groupes_tab_shows_counts: PASSED - Groups show real exchange counts (5, 1, 6, 1 sujets)
frontend_ui.group_click_shows_exchanges: PASSED - Clicking group shows filtered exchanges with skill badges
frontend_ui.accueil_tab_displays: PASSED - All sections (hero, values, KPIs, offers) display correctly

mocked_api.note: AI detection is real (GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key). All APIs are live.
